entities.name: CRM Profile Enrichment
entities.context: Process to gather intelligence from multiple sources and append to CRM profile YAML files

entities.name: Aviato
entities.context: Integration client used to search for person data by email, extracts name, title, company, experience, education, investor info, social links

entities.name: Gmail
entities.context: Used for thread analysis to find communication history with contacts

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: One of the multi-source intelligence sources for profile enrichment

entities.name: V
entities.context: Owner of the Gmail account used for contact thread analysis

entities.name: Multi-source intelligence
entities.context: Approach of gathering data from multiple sources (Aviato, Gmail, LinkedIn) to enrich profiles

relationships.context: Uses Aviato client to search for person by email and extract professional data
Searches Gmail threads with contacts for communication history
One of the intelligence sources for enrichment
V's Gmail account is searched for contact threads
Implements the multi-source intelligence gathering approach
